channel.title: Azure News Feed
channel.description: Aggregated daily news from Azure blogs

item.title: Istio‑Based Weighted Traffic Management on AKS for Enterprise Workloads
item.description: Istio‑Based Weighted Traffic Management Pre-Requisites: AKS containers (internal pods, no Envoy sidecar) Istio Installed and Configured at AKS Cluster (Ingress Gateway–based traffic management) Section 1 — Overview & Why Istio Is Required In modern distributed systems, traffic control is no longer...
item.dc:creator: Amreen

item.title: Welcome to Azure Cosmos DB Conf 2026
item.description: Today is the day. Azure Cosmos DB Conf 2026, in partnership with AMD, is a free virtual developer event focused on building modern, scalable applications with Azure Cosmos DB. The agenda features Microsoft engineers, product team leaders, and members of the global developer community sharing...
item.dc:creator: Jay Gordon

item.title: New Local Management Group for ALZ & Updated Sovereign Policies for SLZ
item.description: Following on from months of working alongside customers, partners, and our internal product groups, we have now made two updates to the Azure landing zone (ALZ) and the Sovereign landing zone (SLZ), that I’d like to walk you through in this post: A new dedicated ‘Local’ Management Group added...
item.dc:creator: jtracey93msft

item.title: Troubleshooting SQL MI Failover Group Creation in Hub–Spoke Network with Centralized Firewall
item.description: Overview Failover groups for Azure SQL Managed Instance provide a managed way to replicate all user databases from a primary managed instance to a secondary managed instance in another region, with stable listener endpoints that remain constant across geo-failovers. In this post, we share a field...
item.dc:creator: YogeshwaranKannaiyan

item.title: PowerToys 0.99 is here: new monitor controls, easier window management, and Dock upgrades
item.description: We’re back with a fresh PowerToys release! This month introduces Power Display for controlling your monitors from the system tray, Grab And Move for quickly moving and resizing windows, and a wave of improvements to Command Palette and the Dock, along with updates across the utility suite. You can...
item.dc:creator: Niels Laute

item.title: An update on GitHub availability
item.description: Here’s what we’ve done—and what we’re still doing—to improve our availability and reliability. The post An update on GitHub availability appeared first on The GitHub Blog.
item.dc:creator: Vlad Fedorov

item.title: Windows 11's Absurd Sleep Timer Recommendations
item.description: My Windows 11 power settings recommend a hibernate timer of over 596,000 hours equivalent to ~70 years. My battery can’t possibly last that long.
item.dc:creator: JacobBrown

item.title: Windows11 File Explorer Customization?
item.description: I relied on customizable shortcuts (Alt+keys) in Windows 10 File Explorer. Is this feature available in Windows 11?
item.dc:creator: Mikaeliop

item.title: Windows 11 stuck in insert external storage loop
item.description: Windows 11 is stuck in a loop with Please insert external storage media and press OK on boot, can't operate normally. Need solutions.
item.dc:creator: OakleyCruz

item.title: Volume decreases after enabling Enhanced Audio in Windows 11
item.description: After enabling the “Enhanced Audio” feature in System Settings, the playback volume noticeably decreases; when this feature is disabled, the volume returns to normal. Even without enabling any specific audio effects, simply toggling this feature on and off results in a noticeable difference in...
item.dc:creator: AAbner

item.title: ryujinx refusing to launch?
item.description: happens with multiple versions and it's whitelisted in the antivirus
item.dc:creator: Archero9

item.title: OBS interface randomly turns pitch black, except preview and program windows
item.description: Os - Windows 11,GPU - GTX 1650 Ti (laptop).Issue persists, I've updated Nvidia GPU drivers, updated OBS itself, but this thing keeps on for several months.When this is happening, I kinda locked in that, the only thing that helps me, is "Fold all windows" (I do it with three fingers swipe down on...
item.dc:creator: Frederickk

item.title: "netbird_installer_0.70.0_windows_amd64.msi" got flagged as a threat by Windows built-in antivirus
item.description: Anyone else getting this?
item.dc:creator: Harrisonte

item.title: How to Report Single-User Teams Online Meetings
item.description: In 2024, I wrote a script explaining how to report details of Teams online meetings, including participants. Now someone wants to report single-user meetings. Their reason is that company management believe that some remote workers schedule online meetings that only they attend with the intention...
item.dc:creator: TonyRedmond

item.title: Any fast and stable way to transfer pictures from iphone to computer?
item.description: I have over 100GB of pictures on my iPhone, and I need a reliable way to transfer them to my Windows PC without crashing halfway or missing files. I don't want cloud uploads (too slow for this much data), and I've had bad luck with random free tools freezing or disconnecting. What's the most stable...
item.dc:creator: Margareot

item.title: MacOS platform SSO deployment issues
item.description: Hello, We tried to deploy MacOS platform SSO but the devices are having problems with their authentication. The devices are connected through company portal but keep asking for logins and authentication, especially on reboot. Some users are prompted to sign-in to their entra account several times...
item.dc:creator: ITIMax

item.title: Deploying Azure Redis Enterprise with Geo-Replication Using Terraform
item.description: This post walks through a production‑proven pattern for running stateful services across Azure regions using Terraform. We’ll cover a primary–replica Redis architecture, regional isolation with Key Vault and networking, and a clean Terraform parameterization strategy that scales from development to...
item.dc:creator: vsakash

item.title: The Future of Agentic AI: Inside Microsoft Agent Framework 1.0
item.description: Agentic AI is rapidly moving beyond demos and chatbots toward long‑running, autonomous systems that reason, call tools, collaborate with other agents, and operate reliably in production. On April 3, 2026, Microsoft marked a major milestone with the General Availability (GA) release of Microsoft...
item.dc:creator: rajesh-yadav

item.title: Why Does Azure App Service Return HTTP 404?
item.description: When an application deployed to Azure App Service suddenly starts returning HTTP 404 – Not Found, it can be confusing —especially when: The deployment completed successfully The App Service shows as Running No obvious errors appear in the portal This behaviour is more common than it appears and is...
item.dc:creator: AmritpalSinghNaroo

item.title: Should I buy a 256gb ssd+external drive or a 512gb ssd model?
item.description: I'm thinking of getting a m4 MacBook air and the cheapest one available is a 256gb model. Should I get the 256gb model and use an external ssd that I already have or buy the 512gb model. I mostly do graphic design and use programs such as photoshop, illustrator, and Indesign. I used a 2019 MacBook...
item.dc:creator: Amiriooim

item.title: How is the Chrome MCP so bad?
item.description: I can't be the only one having trouble using the Claude on chrome mcp right? It worked well for like a week and then suddenly Claude can't use chrome anymore. Uninstalling and reinstalling does not work, I've enabled everything I could, it just simply cannot use chrome, even though the claude...
item.dc:creator: Ridgesop

item.title: Windows Computer 24h2+
item.description: Win11 24h2 ve sonraki sürümde ağ ve paylaşım sorunu var. Netteki neredeyse tüm çözümleri denedim ama düzelmiyor. Bunu yaşayıp çözebilen var mı? İnsider sürümünde de aynı sorun devam ediyor.
item.dc:creator: Frederickk

item.title: Introducing AI Skill Assessment in Azure API Center
item.description: As AI skills become central to enterprise automation and intelligent workflows, ensuring their quality, safety, and discoverability at scale is a growing challenge. Today, we're excited to announce skills assessment in Azure API Center — a built-in, automated quality scoring system powered by the...
item.dc:creator: Sreekanth_Thirthala

item.title: Python Environments Extension for VS Code- April Update
item.description: The April 2026 release update includes the Python Environments extension... Keep on reading to learn more! The post Python Environments Extension for VS Code- April Update appeared first on Microsoft for Python Developers Blog.
item.dc:creator: Vedha Ranganathan

item.title: Combining API versioning with OpenAPI in .NET 10 applications
item.description: Learn how to implement API versioning in your .NET 10 applications using OpenAPI for better API management and documentation. The post Combining API versioning with OpenAPI in .NET 10 applications appeared first on .NET Blog.
item.dc:creator: Sander ten Brinke

item.title: Deprecating Legacy TLS and Endpoints for POP and IMAP in Exchange Online
item.description: Security on the internet continues to evolve, and older cryptographic protocols no longer provide the protections required for today’s threat landscape. As part of our ongoing work to help customers keep their email environments secure, we’re taking another step in modernizing Exchange Online...
item.dc:creator: The_Exchange_Team

item.title: Windows 12 is no longer a thing of the future. It’s already baked into our systems.
item.description: The latest Insider builds feature the full architecture of the new system interface: the new ShellHost (a modern loader for the upcoming shell),the new KryptonShellHost (hosting the brand-new UI),an active WinUI 3 runtime,modern XAML packs,and the entire pipeline ready for deployment. All these...
item.dc:creator: kikero_exe

item.title: Azure Data Studio is retired: Move your Azure SQL workflow to VS Code in 10 minutes
item.description: Azure Data Studio (ADS) retired on February 6, 2025, and support ended on February 28, 2026. The recommended path forward is Visual Studio Code with the MSSQL extension. If you used ADS daily, this guide gets you productive quickly in VS Code. The focus is on importing your existing setup,...
item.dc:creator: Iqra Shaikh

item.title: Copilot Student GPT-5.3-Codex removal from model picker
item.description: Starting today, in our Copilot Student plan, we are removing GPT-5.3-Codex from the model picker. It remains available through auto model selection. Auto model selection is built to match each… The post Copilot Student GPT-5.3-Codex removal from model picker appeared first on The GitHub Blog.
item.dc:creator: Allison

item.title: Lightweight Governance Models for Small-to-Mid-Sized Organizations in Microsoft 365
item.description: Governance in Microsoft 365 (M365) often gets a bad reputation. For many small-to-mid-sized organizations, it conjures images of rigid policies, endless approval workflows, and heavy administrative overhead. But governance doesn’t have to be complicated or burden some to be effective....
item.dc:creator: JohnNaguib

item.title: Assess Secure Boot status with Microsoft Defender
item.description: Understanding the Secure Boot certificate challenge Secure Boot is a foundational security feature that validates the integrity of your device's boot process, ensuring only trusted software can run during system startup. This protection has been quietly defending enterprise devices since 2012, but...
item.dc:creator: amitcohen

item.title: Copilot cloud agent starts 20% faster with Actions custom images
item.description: Copilot cloud agent now starts up over 20% faster, thanks to optimized runner environments built with GitHub Actions custom images. When you assign an issue to Copilot, start a task… The post Copilot cloud agent starts 20% faster with Actions custom images appeared first on The GitHub Blog.
item.dc:creator: Allison

item.title: GitHub Copilot code review will start consuming GitHub Actions minutes on June 1, 2026
item.description: Developers and engineering teams worldwide use GitHub Copilot for high-quality, agent-powered code reviews on every pull request. We understand that any change is significant to our customers, especially when it… The post GitHub Copilot code review will start consuming GitHub Actions minutes on...
item.dc:creator: Allison

item.title: GitHub Copilot is moving to usage-based billing
item.description: Starting June 1, your Copilot usage will consume GitHub AI Credits. The post GitHub Copilot is moving to usage-based billing appeared first on The GitHub Blog.
item.dc:creator: Mario Rodriguez

item.title: Azure Local expands to sovereign-scale infrastructure with disaggregated deployments
item.description: As organizations accelerate digital transformation across datacenters, sovereign environments, and edge locations, infrastructure architectures must evolve to meet new operational and regulatory demands. The first feature update of Azure Local in CY 2026 (version 2604) marks a significant step...
item.dc:creator: troettinger

item.title: Windows 11 Solution To Remove Text Popup
item.description: Windows 11 open registry to HKEY_CURRENT_USER\Control Panel\Mouse set MouseHoverTime to -2000 minus sign required to remove popup
item.dc:creator: AnselRhodes

item.title: Windows 11 Taskbar icons on multiple screens
item.description: In Windows 11, small icons on the right side of the taskbar only show on the main screen and are hidden on other monitors. How to make them appear on all monitors?
item.dc:creator: DaxxonFoster

item.title: Six months after reinstalling the operating system, I received a prompt to activate Windows 11.
item.description: When I sent my computer in for repairs, the shop reinstalled the operating system. Recently, I’ve been prompted to activate Windows. The Home and Student edition that came pre-installed on the computer was genuine. Can I switch back to the original version and have it activated automatically? Or do...
item.dc:creator: GageWilder

item.title: Failed to install Windows 11 Update 25H2, error code 0xc190011f
item.description: When I try to update to Windows 11 25H2, I get an installation error with the error code 0xc190011f. How can I fix this?
item.dc:creator: KairosRivers

item.title: Bring your Dremio data into OneLake (Preview)
item.description: Starting today, Microsoft Fabric customers who use Dremio’s Agentic Lakehouse Platform can seamlessly bring their Dremio-managed data into Microsoft OneLake, without data duplication, unlocking the full suite of Fabric workloads and integrations. Figure: Creating a new Mirrored Dremio catalog item...
item.dc:creator: Microsoft

item.title: Dissecting LLM Container Cold-Start: Where the Time Actually Goes
item.description: Dissecting LLM Container Cold-Start: Where the Time Actually Goes Cold-start latency determines whether GPU clusters can scale to zero, how fast they can autoscale, and whether bursty or low-QPS workloads are economically viable. Most optimization effort targets the container pull path – faster...
item.dc:creator: robcronin

item.title: Restrict Users from Creating New Teams in Microsoft Teams
item.description: Hello together,I've do this here: Manage who can create Microsoft 365 Groups | Microsoft LearnI create a group for users, that allowed to create new Teams Channels and run the script, but i didnt see in the updated settings the group ID: What im doing wrong?At the moment no one can create new Teams...
item.dc:creator: GodCordial

item.title: What to do if iPad is disabled and says to connect to iTunes?
item.description: Hey everyone,My iPad is disabled and the screen says to connect to iTunes. I am not really sure what that means or what I am supposed to do next. I tried unlocking it too many times, and now I am stuck.I am not very techy, so I would really appreciate simple advice. Is there any way to fix iPad is...
item.dc:creator: Willienood

item.title: OneDrive Sync Client Changes How It Processes Deleted Files
item.description: Microsoft plans a May 2026 update for the OneDrive Sync client to improve the way that the client handles the deletion of files stored in SharePoint Online and OneDrive for Business. The client will no longer move the local synchronized copy of the deleted file into the workstation’s recycle bin,...
item.dc:creator: TonyRedmond

item.title: I am going to DVD Copying on Windows PC
item.description: Can anyone advice this novice of the best way to digitise DVD/Bluray movies with menu and subtitle options remaining intact?Just wanting to copy some DVD's I already own for preservation and personal use.Hoping for a relatively inexpensive program, though, also need ease of use.PC: Windows Insider...
item.dc:creator: Kaisond

item.title: Is it possible to stream a ps5 on a laptop screen?
item.description: I have managed to obtain a ps5 just for gta6 but all the stationary screens I have available are inconvenient. I’m pretty sure my laptop (windows) can’t accept video with just a cable. Is there a program that can work as an adapter or does play station offer streaming to other devices?
item.dc:creator: Philipess

item.title: Could I get some help checking what I'm doing wrong with Hello?
item.description: Hi, I've been trying to start working my way through the learnopengl tutorials but I've got stuck almost straight away. Would anyone mind telling me what I've got wrong with this: The clear colour is showing but no triangle is showing.
item.dc:creator: Uriellip

item.title: From Portal Edits to GitOps : Deploying Azure API Management Configuration with APIOps
item.description: Introduction Modern enterprise platforms are increasingly built around APIs, and Azure API Management (APIM) sits at the heart of these systems as the control plane for enforcing policies, managing access, and routing traffic. While APIM provides a powerful interface through the Azure portal, many...
item.dc:creator: aloormahesh

item.title: Protect org data on BYOD Windows / macOS devices
item.description: Hi AllI hope you are well.Anyway, I have a need to protect org data on:Window personal / BYOD devicesMacOS personal / BYOD devicesWhat's the best way to achieve this?My thinking is:1 X Conditional Access policy that blocks1 X Conditional Access policy that allows via Edge, no persistent session, no...
item.dc:creator: StuartK73

item.title: Rethinking Data Modeling: How GitHub Copilot Is Changing the Way We Design Systems
item.description: There is a point in every engineer’s journey where data modeling stops feeling intuitive. What starts as a clean schema becomes harder to reason about. Relationships blur. Query paths multiply. Small changes ripple across different steps. This is where data modeling reveals its real challenge: not...
item.dc:creator: B_Manasa
